chunk_and_embed_a_set_of_documents_so: Chunk and embed a set of documents so they can be upserted into a vector store for retrieval.
embed_items_and_compare_vectors_by_cosin: Embed items and compare vectors by cosine similarity to flag near-duplicate content.
enter_text_to_generate_embeddings_for: Enter text to generate embeddings for
generate_an_openai_embedding_vector_for_: Generate an OpenAI embedding vector for a piece of text to use in semantic search or similarity.
integrate_embeddings_into_the_workflow_c: Integrate Embeddings into the workflow. Can generate embeddings from text.
